svg.text: VERIS — Vocabulary for Event Recording and Incident Sharing
4A Taxonomy · DBIR Incident Patterns · Actor-Action-Asset-Attribute Framework
⚡ Hacking — brute force, SQLi, stolen creds
e.g. Hacking › Use of stolen creds › VPN
🖥 Server (S) — DB, web, mail, file, auth
Data types: PII · PHI · Credentials · PCI · IP
Unauthorized modification of data or systems
Disruption of access to information assets
* Illustrative pattern; actual DBIR percentages vary by year and dataset.
Source: Verizon DBIR methodology. Pattern derivation uses VERIS 4A clustering.
VERIS Actions map to Kill Chain stages
VERIS Actor ↔ STIX Threat Actor objects
Session 11 · Security Operations Master Class · Digital4Security · VERIS schema: github.com/vz-risk/veris
